author: dominikmayer
description: Displays notes by their ID, enabling structured sequences for manuscripts or a Zettelkasten ("Folgezettel").

manifest.author: Dominik Mayer
manifest.description: Displays notes by their ID, enabling structured sequences for manuscripts or Zettelkasten ("Folgezettel").

name: Note ID

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's new

- Removed "builtin-modules"

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.4.3...1.4.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

Performance improvements by

- enabling Elm optimization
- no longer subscribing to modify handler

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.4.2...1.4.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# What's Changed

- Fixed issue that prevented rendering of large lists

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.4.1...1.4.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Numbers that could be mistaken for exponential notation (`1.6e1`) will now be escaped #19 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.4.0...1.4.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What Changed?

- Added support for filtering #14 
- Fixed command display in modals on Windows
- Moved a lot of the logic from TypeScript to Elm

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Added search modal
- Added attach to note modal #7

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.2.2...1.3.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Performance improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Made title sorting case-insensitively
- Reorganized settings
- Prevented creation of duplicate note ids by defaulting to no id when no unique ID can be created
- Fixed bug where split levels were wrong after renaming a note or changing a note ID

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* Added setting to automatically include notes in the table of contents #8 
* Clicking on a note in the table of contents now shows the note in the notes list

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dominikmayer/obsidian-note-id/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0
